name: secure-auth
description: Opinionated Next.js authentication monorepo — @tgoliveira/secure-auth package + starter app (experimental)

scripts.build: npm run build -w @tgoliveira/secure-auth && npm run build -w @secure-auth/starter
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @tgoliveira/secure-auth && npm run lint -w @secure-auth/starter
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @tgoliveira/secure-auth && npm run typecheck -w @secure-auth/starter
scripts.test: npm run test -w @tgoliveira/secure-auth && npm run test -w @secure-auth/starter
